summary: Code quality review regression testing completed successfully. All backend admin endpoints working correctly with refactored bot_config_repo. Frontend admin auth migrated to sessionStorage. No regressions detected in core functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Legacy localStorage token not automatically cleared during migration
integration_issues.details: The migration copies localStorage token to sessionStorage but doesn't clear the old one. This is cosmetic as the app uses sessionStorage correctly.

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/bots/config returns correct structure with loyalty + news_repost
PUT /api/admin/bots/config news_repost patch persists enabled_for.telegram=true and interval_minutes=15
GET /api/admin/bots/news-repost/status returns config + queue_preview with items
POST /api/admin/bots/news-repost/test-send returns dry_run status with preview_text
GET /api/admin/bots/jobs returns 4 expected jobs: heartbeat, news_refresh, loyalty_email, news_repost
Frontend admin login stores token in sessionStorage
Frontend admin navigation works with sessionStorage token
Frontend landing page loads normally with DeepStateIntro animation
Frontend intro animation works with ?intro=force parameter
